content: Hi, I'm Logan. I'm a physical therapist, and I love my job, but I'm also really into knitting in my free time.
That's a great combination, Logan! Knitting can be very therapeutic. What do you like to knit?
I love knitting scarves and hats, they're so practical and easy to make. I also enjoy archery, it's a great way to relax and focus.
Archery sounds like a great hobby. Do you have a favorite spot to practice?
Yeah, there's a great range near my house in Phoenix, AZ. I also love hiking and exploring new trails, it's a great way to get some exercise and enjoy nature.
Phoenix is a beautiful city, Logan. What do you like to do after a long hike?
I love brewing a cup of coffee and playing some chess, it's a great way to unwind. I'm also working on my part-time MBA, it's been a challenge but it's worth it.
That's impressive, Logan. You're really committed to your education and personal growth. How do you balance work and school?
It's not always easy, but I prioritize my tasks and make sure to take breaks when I need them. I also practice yoga to help manage stress.
Yoga is a great way to reduce stress, Logan. Do you have any favorite yoga poses or routines?
I love doing downward-facing dog and warrior poses, they're so energizing. I've been doing yoga for about 5 years now, and it's really helped me with my physical therapy work.
That's great to hear, Logan. It's always important to take care of our bodies and minds. I've really enjoyed chatting with you!
